descriptionKo: INFOCOM은 네트워크 분야(Computer Communications)의 주요 국제 학회입니다. 최근 acceptance rate는 18.7% (2025년, 272/1458편)입니다. 주요 연구 키워드: Efficient, Federated Learning, Optimization, Scheduling, Wireless. 매년 5월 개최. CCF A등급, CORE A*, BK21 4점.
descriptionEn: INFOCOM is a leading international conference in Networks (Computer Communications). Recent acceptance rate: 18.7% (2025, 272/1458 papers). Top research topics: Efficient, Federated Learning, Optimization, Scheduling, Wireless. Typically held in May. CCF rank A, CORE A*.
